name: Sausage Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add cracker or bread crumbs to a bowl until the mixture is thick enough to hold shape.
2. Mix in the sausage meat, eggs, butter, and milk until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into oblong croquettes.
4. Dust the croquettes with additional cracker or breadcrumbs.
5. Fry the croquettes in lard until golden brown.
